{{Quote|Not true! Mosko not need help, Mosko honor you with his company!|Mosko to [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="Life, Death, and the Living Force">{{Tales|1|Life, Death, and the Living Force}}</ref>}}
'''Mosko Bolpa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Moggonite/Legends|Moggonite]] from [[Arorua]] who lived a decade before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Biography==
Bolpa was rescued from a [[Blagwahr]] snare by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], but denied that he ever needed help to Qui-Gon and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Qui-Gon took him back to their camp in the Arorua jungles, where Mosko arrogantly demanded food from them. Qui-Gon gave it to him, much to the chagrin of the annoyed Obi-Wan. Mosko left after that, but came back later and attacked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] camp with several of his Moggonite friends; they were all quickly vanquished by Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|1|Life, Death, and the Living Force}} {{1st}}
